NOT_a_phase2_qat_site: CNNStateCorrelator reverse_arg_sum (:1831) and cpwgt_arg_sum (:1856): bare tf.matmul accumulators feeding tanh (no Dense object to wrap). Phase 2 quantizes the tanh OUTPUT (cphi/alpha, analytic I=1), NOT these accumulators. Their integer width is a Phase-4 HLS accumulator decision (= f(weight_bits, state_bits, n_terms)), not a QAT quantizer. Deliberate scope: measure at Phase-4 HLS profiling via op-level tf.matmul capture if needed.
